title: Sync Working Status/Availability with MS Teams/Slack/Calendars

posts.author: dgamarante (Dcn Gregory Amarante)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Allow users to sync their availability across platforms. E.g., MS Teams availability is tied to my Outlook Calendar and adjusts accordingly. Please allow this real-time status to sync to Monday.com so that users do not have to manage statuses in two places.

What are you trying to achieve

Availability consistency across products.
